**warikoo Wanderings**

​

**GET EPIC SHIT DONE!**

My second book launches for pre-order today (and starts shipping Dec 17th 2022).   
It is called **[GET EPIC SHIT DONE.](https://ankurwarikoo.com/GetEpicShitDone)**

When I was a college student, there used to be this book containing answers to the last 10 years’ question papers.   
We used to call it a *kunji* in Delhi.   
That book helped me immensely, to prepare for my exams.

In my second book, I have attempted to create the same book for life.

Written as a conversation between a student and a teacher, GET EPIC SHIT DONE answers 36 life questions that you face almost everyday, questions that you need answers to.

I have personally signed 20,000 copies as part of this pre-order, so **[order now to get a signed copy of GET EPIC SHIT DONE!](https://ankurwarikoo.com/GetEpicShitDone)​**

*​*

**RESPONSES TO LAST WEEK'S QUESTION**

Last week I asked you:

How much total money did you make in the past 12 months?

Here are the responses:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!ipiX!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb5260450-7596-4b1f-9f45-01675677e2b6_734x206.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!ipiX!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb5260450-7596-4b1f-9f45-01675677e2b6_734x206.png)

​

Observations:

* Observe the medians - those are the most likely outcomes for the group (the averages are clouded by the max earning people).
* Which means, if you are in the following salary ranges, you represent MOST of what the world gets:
  
  + 23-30yrs: Between 4.5L-8L
  + 31-40yrs: Between 19L-35L
  + 40+ yrs: Between 37-64L
* I share the max not to create FOMO but to tell you HOW FAR AWAY the max is from the average, clearly establishing that the max is never the normal. It is a very small section of society. Do not compare yourself with them and make yourself miserable.

My response?  
I earned 48L in the last 12 months as a salary (from my own company). I do not take any other money from the company.

​

**PICTURE OF THE WEEK**

On Saturday I attended 2 events in Mumbai - the Spotify Creator Day and the India Today Conclave. Had a lot of fun at both - they were so different from each other in their content, vibe and audience. Clearly my outfit reflected the tonality of the event :))

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!aGpu!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F81682bfd-321c-4160-a428-75ee0b29cf9c_576x1024.jpeg)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!aGpu!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F81682bfd-321c-4160-a428-75ee0b29cf9c_576x1024.jpeg)

**QUESTION OF THE WEEK**

Will you be watching the T20 Cricket WC Final?

1. Yes
2. No
3. T20 WC is going on??

​[​Click here to let me know your answer (anonymously)​​​​](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe8xL_VkiD8fxqTxTOMFhGrRFX3qDcFWe9WVTjU4FZsWgnMPA/viewform)​
